speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] First up on the Green Desk, and this is massive - the world has officially protected more than 10% of our global oceans for the first time. The milestone was reached after Indonesia and Thailand added nearly 300 new marine protected areas.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And in conservation news that'd make any panda proud, Giant pandas have officially been upgraded from 'Endangered' to 'Least Concern' on the conservation list. Turns out decades of protection actually works - who would've thought, right?

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] Meanwhile, for the first time ever, wind and solar power generated more electricity than fossil fuels across the entire European Union. That's not just symbolic - that's structural change happening before our eyes. Back to you legends at the desk.
